mapper.sql: id, blacklist_id, attack_id, traffic_id, rule_id, ban_type, ban_reason, ban_duration, expire_time, process_status, operator, ban_execute_time, unban_execute_time, unban_reason, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_ip_blacklist_history WHERE blacklist_id = #{blacklistId} ORDER BY ban_execute_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_ip_blacklist_history WHERE blacklist_id = #{blacklistId} AND process_status = 1 AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > NOW()) ORDER BY ban_execute_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_ip_blacklist_history ORDER BY ban_execute_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ip_blacklist_history WHERE blacklist_id = #{blacklistId}
SELECT COUNT(h.id) FROM sys_ip_blacklist_history h INNER JOIN sys_ip_blacklist b ON h.blacklist_id = b.id WHERE b.ip_address = #{ip}
